assertions.title: Missing key falls back to en

steps.action: Import /abyssfire/src/i18n/index.ts plus zh-CN/en locale modules and compare key sets
steps.expected: Find a real key present only in en if one exists
steps.observed: Found en-only key test.enOnly by diffing locale module keys

steps.action: Set locale to zh-CN and evaluate t('test.enOnly')
steps.observed: Returned 'This key only exists in English'

evidence.network: N/A — validated via in-browser runtime module import/eval; no API request involved

assertions.title: Completely missing key returns key path or safe fallback

steps.action: Evaluate t('nonexistent.totally.fake.key') in the loaded app session
steps.expected: No exception and a defined fallback string

evidence.network: N/A — validated via in-browser runtime module import/eval; no API request involved

assertions.title: Locale switching updates t() output immediately

steps.action: Set locale to zh-CN and evaluate t('menu.newGame')
Switch locale to en and evaluate t('menu.newGame') again
steps.observed: Returned 'New Journey' in the same session without reload

evidence.network: N/A — validated via in-browser runtime module import/eval; no API request involved

assertions.title: All three locales (zh-CN, zh-TW, en) are registered

steps.expected: Exactly zh-CN, zh-TW, and en are registered

evidence.network: N/A — validated via in-browser runtime module import/eval; no API request involved

assertions.title: zh-TW strings differ from zh-CN where expected

steps.action: Compare zh-CN vs zh-TW outputs for keys with convertible characters
steps.expected: Traditional Chinese output differs from Simplified Chinese where mappings apply
steps.observed: menu.help: '游戏控制' -> '遊戲控製'; menu.language: '语言' -> '語言'

steps.action: Visually confirm the menu in zh-TW
steps.expected: Rendered menu text shows Traditional Chinese variants
steps.observed: Screenshot shows zh-TW menu text including '遊戲控製', '原聲音樂', '製作名單', and '語言'

evidence.network: N/A — validated via in-browser runtime module import/eval plus rendered menu screenshot; no API request involved

assertions.title: zh-TW conversion handles characters not in mapping table

steps.action: Evaluate t('menu.continue', { class: t('data.class.warrior.name'), level: 5 }) in zh-CN and zh-TW
steps.expected: ASCII, numbers, and punctuation remain unchanged while mapped CJK characters convert
steps.observed: zh-CN: '继续游戏 - 战士 Lv.5'; zh-TW: '繼續遊戲 - 戰士 Lv.5'

steps.action: Check the zh-TW output for unmapped ASCII segments
steps.expected: The substring 'Lv.5' and separator ' - ' are preserved exactly
steps.observed: Both 'Lv.5' and ' - ' remained unchanged in zh-TW output

evidence.network: N/A — validated via in-browser runtime module import/eval; no API request involved

frictions.description: The validation contract references menu.new_game, but the current runtime key is menu.newGame, and its current value ('新的旅程') is identical in zh-CN and zh-TW, so it could not demonstrate a Traditional/Simplified diff for VAL-FOUND-015.
frictions.resolution: Used live runtime outputs for keys with actual convertible characters (menu.help and menu.language) and captured a zh-TW menu screenshot for visual support.

summary: Tested 6 assigned assertions in one isolated browser session; all 6 passed. No browser errors were reported during the flow.
